Disassembly

Registers

Watches

varregvalue
Run a program that uses Gpio.* (or the GPIO DSL). Outputs show what it wrote (0–1024); click an IN pin to drive it, then re-run.
pack Design a typed schema and author cards. The running program shares this store via Storage.* / the STORE/LOAD DSL.
Run a program that uses Device.* / Stream.*. The reference DMA ring renders each device, its stream, and the frames read (RX) or submitted (TX) — bytes shown live, live until Stream.Release.
Run a program that builds a window with Ui.*. This panel is a reference remote client: it renders the Ui.Serialize wire (decoded as PicoSerializer/PSC1 records) as window chrome + controls. Click a button or checkbox to post an Event.* back to the program.
2-stage report / form: the current program is stage 1 (its output ints are the data); the template below is stage 2. report = read-only, form = editable inputs.
